sections.label: Verse 1
lines: I was chasing every whisper in my mind
Every shadow dressed like truth I couldn’t find
Thought I knew the way by maps I drew alone
But every road just led me further from home

sections.label: Pre-Chorus
lines: In the noise, in the doubt, in the endless spinning sky
There’s a voice calling deeper than the why

sections.label: Chorus
lines: To know wisdom, to feel what is true
To awaken what’s hidden in you
Hear the words, let your spirit arise
See with more than the sight of your eyes
Let the wise grow wiser still
Let your heart learn how to be still
Trust the path you cannot see
There is truth beyond what you believe

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: I was leaning on the echoes of my fear
Building walls out of what wasn’t clear
Every answer felt like slipping through my hands
Till I let go and chose not to understand

sections.label: Pre-Chorus
lines: In surrender, in the silence, something starts to break
Not the soul—but the weight we try to make

sections.label: Chorus
lines: To know wisdom, to feel what is true
To awaken what’s hidden in you
Hear the words, let your spirit arise
See with more than the sight of your eyes
Let the wise grow wiser still
Let your heart learn how to be still
Trust the path you cannot see
There is truth beyond what you believe

sections.label: Bridge
lines: Not my thoughts, not my fragile design
There’s a higher hand rewriting every line
In the unknown, I am finally found
When I lose control, I stand on sacred ground

sections.label: Breakdown
lines: Teach me listening, not just knowing
Teach me trusting, not controlling

sections.label: Final Chorus
lines: To know wisdom, to feel what is true
To awaken what’s hidden in you
Hear the call that’s been there all along
Even silence is a sacred song
Let the wise grow wiser still
Let surrender shape Your will
I will walk where I can’t see
And trust the truth You speak in me

sections.label: Outro
lines: I release what I thought I knew
And find my way by trusting You
